name: Robot Mower V&V Decomposition
description: A Bayesian Belief Network decomposing the verification and validation of a robot mower. Each node is a specific, testable claim about the system's behaviour. Probability represents confidence that the claim has been verified true. Layer 1: hardware/firmware properties. Layer 2: component behaviours. Layer 3: scenario-level behaviours. Layer 4: system validation evidence. Layer 5: top-level V&V verdict.

nodes.label: IMU Calibration Valid
nodes.description: IMU accelerometer and gyroscope calibration error < 0.5° drift per hour

nodes.label: RTK-GPS Fix Achieved
nodes.description: RTK-GPS achieves fixed solution with HDOP < 1.0 within 90s of power-on

nodes.label: Blade PWM Responds in <10ms
nodes.description: Blade motor PWM duty cycle changes take effect within 10ms of command

nodes.label: E-Stop Circuit <50ms
nodes.description: Hardware emergency stop circuit interrupts blade power within 50ms

nodes.label: Watchdog Resets on Hang
nodes.description: Hardware watchdog triggers system reset if main loop stalls for >200ms

nodes.label: All RTOS Deadlines Met
nodes.description: No RTOS task misses its deadline under worst-case execution time analysis

nodes.label: Firmware CRC Verified
nodes.description: Firmware image CRC-32 is verified on every boot before execution

nodes.label: Battery SOC ±5%
nodes.description: Battery state-of-charge estimation is accurate within ±5% across full range

nodes.label: BLE Pairing Uses LESC
nodes.description: Bluetooth LE pairing uses LE Secure Connections with numeric comparison

nodes.label: OTA Signature Verified
nodes.description: OTA firmware updates are rejected unless Ed25519 signature is valid

nodes.label: Motor Current Sensed ±2%
nodes.description: Wheel and blade motor current sensing is accurate within ±2%

nodes.label: Ultrasonic Range ±3cm
nodes.description: Ultrasonic distance sensors are accurate within ±3cm at 0.2–3m range

nodes.label: Tilt Sensor Triggers >15°
nodes.description: Tilt/lift sensor reliably triggers blade stop when chassis tilts beyond 15°

nodes.label: Rain Sensor Detects 1mm/hr
nodes.description: Rain sensor detects rainfall rates as low as 1mm/hr and triggers return-to-dock

nodes.label: Charging CC/CV Profile Correct
nodes.description: Battery charging follows correct constant-current/constant-voltage profile per cell spec

nodes.label: Position Accuracy <2cm
nodes.description: Fused GPS+IMU+odometry position estimate is within 2cm of ground truth

nodes.label: Heading Accuracy <1°
nodes.description: Heading estimate from IMU+GPS fusion is within 1° of true heading

nodes.label: Blade Stops Within 1s
nodes.description: Blade motor reaches zero RPM within 1 second of stop command

nodes.label: Blade Speed ±50 RPM
nodes.description: Blade motor maintains target RPM within ±50 RPM under varying grass load

nodes.label: Obstacle Detected at 30cm
nodes.description: Static obstacles >10cm height are detected at minimum 30cm distance

nodes.label: Moving Object Detected 50cm
nodes.description: Moving objects (pets, children) detected at minimum 50cm distance

nodes.label: Lift Stops Blade <200ms
nodes.description: Blade motor power is cut within 200ms of mower being lifted

nodes.label: Stays Within Boundary ±5cm
nodes.description: Mower does not cross virtual boundary by more than 5cm

nodes.label: Returns to Dock Successfully
nodes.description: Mower navigates to charging dock and aligns with contacts within 3 attempts

nodes.label: Straight Line ±3cm
nodes.description: Mower tracks a straight mowing line with lateral deviation <3cm

nodes.label: Turn Accuracy ±5°
nodes.description: Mower executes point turns within ±5° of commanded angle

nodes.label: Returns at 15% SOC
nodes.description: Mower interrupts mowing and returns to dock when SOC drops to 15%

nodes.label: Rain Triggers Dock Return
nodes.description: Mower returns to dock within 60s of rain sensor activation

nodes.label: OTA Rollback on Failure
nodes.description: Failed OTA update automatically rolls back to previous firmware within 30s

nodes.label: App Connects via BLE <10s
nodes.description: Mobile app establishes authenticated BLE connection within 10 seconds

nodes.label: Watchdog Recovery <5s
nodes.description: System recovers from watchdog reset and resumes safe state within 5 seconds

nodes.label: Full Charge in <90min
nodes.description: Battery charges from 15% to 100% within 90 minutes on dock

nodes.label: Motor Stall Detected <500ms
nodes.description: Wheel or blade motor stall condition is detected within 500ms

nodes.label: Holds on 25° Slope
nodes.description: Mower maintains position on 25° slope without sliding when stationary

nodes.label: Diag Log Upload <30s
nodes.description: Diagnostic log is uploaded to cloud within 30 seconds of WiFi connection

nodes.label: Mows Rectangle Evenly
nodes.description: 100m² rectangular lawn mowed with <5% uncut area in single session

nodes.label: Mows L-Shaped Garden
nodes.description: L-shaped garden with passage correctly mowed including zone transition

nodes.label: Avoids Garden Furniture
nodes.description: Mower navigates around static garden furniture without contact

nodes.label: Stops for Approaching Child
nodes.description: Blade stops and mower halts when child approaches within 50cm

nodes.label: Stops for Pet
nodes.description: Blade stops when cat/dog enters detection zone while mowing

nodes.label: Mows 15° Slope Safely
nodes.description: Mower mows up and down 15° slope maintaining straight lines and blade height

nodes.label: Handles Rain Mid-Mow
nodes.description: Mower safely returns to dock when rain begins during mowing session

nodes.label: Completes Full Mow Cycle
nodes.description: Undock → mow entire area → return → dock in single session on full battery

nodes.label: Resumes After Recharge
nodes.description: Mower charges then resumes mowing remaining area without re-cutting

nodes.label: Edge Cut Within 5cm
nodes.description: Boundary edges are cut cleanly with <5cm uncut strip along perimeter

nodes.label: Operates Correctly at Night
nodes.description: Mowing functions correctly in complete darkness (no vision dependency)

nodes.label: Recovers When Stuck
nodes.description: Mower detects stuck condition and executes recovery manoeuvre within 30s

nodes.label: Handles 15cm Tall Grass
nodes.description: Mower cuts 15cm grass without stalling by reducing speed automatically

nodes.label: No Injury on Lift
nodes.description: Blade is stopped and locked before mower body can be raised 10cm

nodes.label: Field Firmware Update Works
nodes.description: OTA update installs successfully and mower resumes normal operation

nodes.label: App Shows Live Status
nodes.description: Mobile app displays mower position, battery %, and current activity within 2s

nodes.label: App Start/Stop Commands Work
nodes.description: User can start and stop mowing from mobile app with <3s response time

nodes.label: Theft Alarm Triggers
nodes.description: Alarm sounds and owner notification sent when mower is lifted outside boundary

nodes.label: Safe on Power Glitch
nodes.description: Mower enters safe state (blade stop) on sudden power brown-out

nodes.label: Zone Transition Via Passage
nodes.description: Mower navigates 1m-wide passage between mowing zones without boundary violation

nodes.label: Mows Damp Grass
nodes.description: Mower cuts damp (not soaked) grass without clogging or losing traction

nodes.label: Scheduled Mow Executes
nodes.description: Pre-scheduled mowing session starts within ±2min of configured time

nodes.label: Fault Reported to App
nodes.description: Hardware fault (sensor failure, motor issue) is reported to app within 60s

nodes.label: Handles Multiple Obstacles
nodes.description: Mower navigates around two adjacent obstacles without collision

nodes.label: Safe When GPS Lost
nodes.description: Mower stops mowing and returns to last known position when RTK fix is lost for >10s

nodes.label: 100hrs Operation No Fault
nodes.description: Mower completes 100 hours of cumulative mowing without critical fault

nodes.label: 1000 Dock Cycles Reliable
nodes.description: Mower docks and undocks 1000 times with >99% success rate

nodes.label: Tested in 50 Gardens
nodes.description: Mower successfully mows 50 different garden shapes and sizes in field trials

nodes.label: Zero Blade Contact Events
nodes.description: No blade contact with persons/animals across all field testing

nodes.label: 20° Slope Tested Safe
nodes.description: Mower operates safely on 20° slopes across 10 different terrain types

nodes.label: 100 Rain Events Handled
nodes.description: Mower correctly returned to dock in 100 consecutive rain onset events

nodes.label: 50 OTA Updates Successful
nodes.description: 50 consecutive OTA updates applied and verified across test fleet

nodes.label: App Usability Score >4/5
nodes.description: Average usability score >4/5 from 100 beta testers

nodes.label: EN 55014 EMC Pass
nodes.description: Mower passes EN 55014 conducted and radiated emissions at accredited lab

nodes.label: IEC 60335-2-107 Pass
nodes.description: Mower passes all clauses of IEC 60335-2-107 robotic mower safety standard

nodes.label: Noise <60 dBA at 1m
nodes.description: Measured noise level <60 dBA at 1m distance per 2000/14/EC

nodes.label: Penetration Test Passed
nodes.description: Independent pen test finds no critical/high severity vulnerabilities

nodes.label: GDPR Data Handling Valid
nodes.description: GPS tracks and usage data are encrypted, anonymized, and deletable per GDPR

nodes.label: Battery Safety UN38.3 Pass
nodes.description: Battery passes UN38.3 transport safety tests: crush, short, overcharge

nodes.label: MTBF >5000 Hours
nodes.description: Calculated MTBF exceeds 5000 operating hours from field reliability data

nodes.label: -10°C to 40°C Validated
nodes.description: All functions verified across -10°C to 40°C temperature range

nodes.label: Night Operation Safe
nodes.description: Night mowing validated as safe: no additional risk vs. daytime

nodes.label: GPS Denied Mode Safe
nodes.description: Mower remains safe and returns to dock when GPS is jammed or denied

nodes.label: 2 Mowers Same Garden OK
nodes.description: Two mowers operate in same garden without collision or zone conflict

nodes.label: Installer Validation Pass
nodes.description: Professional installers successfully set up mower in <30min across 20 sites

nodes.label: ISO 13482 Child Safety
nodes.description: Mower meets ISO 13482 personal care robot safety requirements for children

nodes.label: MC/DC Coverage >80%
nodes.description: Modified condition/decision coverage exceeds 80% for safety-critical modules

nodes.label: SIL 2 Verified
nodes.description: Blade safety function verified to SIL 2 per IEC 61508

nodes.label: Full Traceability
nodes.description: 100% bidirectional traceability from requirements to test results

nodes.label: -40°C Storage Validated
nodes.description: Mower survives -40°C storage and boots correctly after warming

nodes.label: Blade System Safe
nodes.description: All blade-related injury risks reduced to acceptable level

nodes.label: Navigation Reliable
nodes.description: Navigation system meets accuracy and reliability requirements in all conditions

nodes.label: Electrically Safe
nodes.description: All electrical safety requirements met including battery and EMC

nodes.label: Cyber Secure
nodes.description: No exploitable vulnerabilities in communications, OTA, or cloud interface

nodes.label: Child & Pet Safe
nodes.description: System is safe for operation in gardens with children and pets

nodes.label: Environmentally Robust
nodes.description: Operates reliably across all specified environmental conditions

nodes.label: Reliable & Durable
nodes.description: System meets reliability and durability targets for product lifetime

nodes.label: User Experience Validated
nodes.description: End users and installers find the product easy to use and effective

nodes.label: Software Quality Assured
nodes.description: Software meets all quality gates and coverage requirements

nodes.label: Regulatory Requirements Met
nodes.description: All applicable regulatory and standards requirements satisfied

nodes.label: Safety Case Accepted
nodes.description: Independent safety assessor accepts the safety case

nodes.label: Field Validation Complete
nodes.description: All field trial acceptance criteria met

nodes.label: Software Release Approved
nodes.description: Software release review board approves release candidate

nodes.label: System V&V Complete
nodes.description: Complete system verification and validation verdict: PASS

nodes.label: CE Mark Granted
nodes.description: Product receives CE marking for EU market
